title: PSI to Bar Converter
description: Industrial-grade pressure unit converter with validation, loss analysis, and confidence-adjusted output. Compliant with ISO 80000-1, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Pressure (PSI)
inputs.businessContext: Input pressure in pounds per square inch (PSI). Typical range: 0–100,000 psi for industrial applications.

businessContext_i18n.en: Input pressure in pounds per square inch (PSI). Typical range: 0–100,000 psi for industrial applications.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pound bölü inçkare (PSI) cinsinden giriş basıncı. Tipik aralık: endüstriyel uygulamalar için 0–100.000 psi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Eingangsdruck in Pfund pro Quadratzoll (PSI). Typischer Bereich: 0–100.000 psi für industrielle Anwendungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression d'entrée en livres par pouce carré (PSI). Plage typique : 0–100 000 psi pour les applications industrielles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión de entrada en libras por pulgada cuadrada (PSI). Rango típico: 0–100,000 psi para aplicaciones industriales.

inputs.label: Temperature (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Process temperature in Celsius. Used for thermal correction per ISO 80000-1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Process temperature in Celsius. Used for thermal correction per ISO 80000-1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proses sıcaklığı (°C). ISO 80000-1'e göre termal düzeltme için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozesstemperatur in Celsius. Wird für die thermische Korrektur gemäß ISO 80000-1 verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température du processus en degrés Celsius. Utilisée pour la correction thermique selon la norme ISO 80000-1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura del proceso en Celsius. Se utiliza para corrección térmica según ISO 80000-1.

inputs.label: Altitude (m)
inputs.businessContext: Altitude above sea level for barometric correction. Relevant for high-altitude installations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Altitude above sea level for barometric correction. Relevant for high-altitude installations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Barometrik düzeltme için deniz seviyesinden yükseklik. Yüksek rakımlı tesisler için önemlidir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe über dem Meeresspiegel für die barometrische Korrektur. Relevant für Installationen in großer Höhe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Altitude au-dessus du niveau de la mer pour la correction barométrique. Pertinente pour les installations en haute altitude.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altitud sobre el nivel del mar para corrección barométrica. Relevante para instalaciones en altitud.

inputs.label: Fluid Type
inputs.businessContext: Select fluid type for density correction. Options: water, oil, gas, steam.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select fluid type for density correction. Options: water, oil, gas, steam.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yoğunluk düzeltmesi için akışkan türünü seçin. Seçenekler: su, yağ, gaz, buhar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie den Fluidtyp für die Dichtekorrektur. Optionen: Wasser, Öl, Gas, Dampf.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez le type de fluide pour la correction de densité. Options : eau, huile, gaz, vapeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione el tipo de fluido para la corrección de densidad. Opciones: agua, aceite, gas, vapor.

inputs.label: Apply Temperature Correction
inputs.businessContext: Enable thermal expansion correction for pressure measurement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enable thermal expansion correction for pressure measurement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Basınç ölçümü için termal genleşme düzeltmesini etkinleştir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktivieren Sie die Korrektur der thermischen Ausdehnung für die Druckmessung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Activer la correction de dilatation thermique pour la mesure de pression.
businessContext_i18n.es: Habilitar la corrección por expansión térmica para la medición de presión.

inputs.label: Apply Altitude Correction
inputs.businessContext: Enable barometric pressure correction based on altitude.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enable barometric pressure correction based on altitude.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rakıma dayalı barometrik basınç düzeltmesini etkinleştir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktivieren Sie die barometrische Druckkorrektur basierend auf der Höhe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Activer la correction de pression barométrique en fonction de l'altitude.
businessContext_i18n.es: Habilitar la corrección de presión barométrica basada en la altitud.

rules.message: Pressure must be between 0 and 100,000 psi.
Altitude must be between -500 m and 10,000 m.
Temperature correction is recommended for extreme temperatures outside -10°C to 50°C.

thresholds.message: Pressure exceeds 10,000 psi. Verify equipment rating per ISO 4126.
Pressure exceeds 50,000 psi. Immediate safety check required.
Temperature below -20°C. Risk of fluid freezing or material brittleness.
Altitude above 3000 m. Barometric correction strongly advised.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
